chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الْإِشَارَةِ وَ النَّصِّ عَلَى أَبِي الْحَسَنِ الرِّضَا ( عليه السلام )
chapter_title.en: Chapter 72 – The Indication and the wordings upon Abu Al-Hassan Al-Reza<sup>asws</sup>

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/346)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/346)
text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي إِبْرَاهِيمَ ( عليه السلام ) إِنِّي سَأَلْتُ أَبَاكَ ( عليه السلام ) مَنِ الَّذِي يَكُونُ مِنْ بَعْدِكَ فَأَخْبَرَنِي أَنَّكَ أَنْتَ هُوَ فَلَمَّا تُوُفِّيَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) ذَهَبَ النَّاسُ يَمِيناً وَ شِمَالًا وَ قُلْتُ فِيكَ أَنَا وَ أَصْحَابِي فَأَخْبِرْنِي مَنِ الَّذِي يَكُونُ مِنْ بَعْدِكَ مِنْ وُلْدِكَ فَقَالَ ابْنِي فُلَانٌ .

en.hubeali: Ahmad Bin Mihran, from Muhammad Bin Ali, from Saeed Bin Abu Al Jahm, from Al Nasr Bin Qabous who said,

‘I said to Abu Ibrahim<sup>asws</sup> (7<sup>th</sup> Imam<sup>asws</sup>), ‘I asked your<sup>asws</sup> father<sup>asws</sup> who is that who would happen to be from after you<sup>asws</sup>. So he<sup>asws</sup> informed me that you<sup>asws</sup> are him<sup>asws</sup>. So when Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> passed away, the people went right and left, and I said regarding you<sup>asws</sup>, I and my companions. Therefore, inform me, who is the one who would happen to be from after you<sup>asws</sup> from your<sup>asws</sup> sons?’ So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘My<sup>asws</sup> son, so and so’.
en.sarwar: 12. Ahmad ibn Mihran has narrated from Muhammad ibn Ali from Sa‘id ibn abu al-Jahm from al-Nasr ibn Qabus who has said the following. “I said to abu Ibrahim (a.s.), ‘I asked your father, “Who will be (the Imam) after you? He informed me that you will be (the Imam after him). When abu ‘Abdallah (a.s.) left this world people went let and right and I said that I with my people are with you. Inform me who will be (the Imam) after you from your sons.” He (the Imam (a.s.) said, “My son so and so.”
